title: Dirtside Raid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Dirtside Raid''' was any strategy used by larger well-armed [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] fleets to raid planetary locations—typically poorly defended ones, like colonies and factories.
